concerns.text: SC-003 requires calculating the 'Area Under the Precision-Recall Curve (AUPRC)' to validate the risk map. Task T033 only mentions validating the map and marking it N/A, with no instruction to compute or report the AUPRC metric.

FR-007 explicitly requires p-values derived from an 'empirical permutation test'. Task T027 mentions calculating p-values and applying FDR but omits the mandatory 'permutation-based approach' source, risking a default parametric test.

SC-005 requires reporting the 'variation (delta/range)' of FP/FN rates across specific cutoffs {0.3, 0.5, 0.7}. Task T032 mentions reporting 'variations' but lacks the explicit requirement to calculate the delta/range metric or enforce the specific cutoff set.

SC-004 requires measuring 'computational runtime' against the 6-hour limit. Task T038 mentions running a validation to ensure execution within the constraint but does not explicitly require capturing and reporting the measured runtime value as evidence.

US-3 Acceptance Scenario 2 requires identifying the dominant driver for a 'specific location' (pixel-level explanation). Task T031 asks to 'Query model explanation for high-risk zones' which is ambiguous and could be interpreted as global importance rather than the required local (LIME/SHAP) explanation.
